title: P1.11: PRD.md v0 -> v1 refresh (GLOSSARY/CONVENTIONS internalised)
description:
Phase 1 step P1.11 per MIGRATION_PLAN.md:135. Refresh PRD.md from v0 (Phase 0 scaffold) to v1 (Phase 1 canonical baseline complete).

Changes:
1. Version line: 'v0 ... Phase 0 ... in progress' -> 'v1 ... Phase 1 complete'.
2. Phase-0 exception note (line 60): 'lifts at P1.10' -> 'lifted at P1.10 ([commit])'; v1 removes the GLOSSARY-empty exception since GLOSSARY is now populated.
3. Canonical artifacts section: flesh out with pointers to specific GLOSSARY entries an agent must internalise per task class:
   - Math content: def:fuscat, def:HP, def:Hlatt, def:mobile-Fock, def:partition, def:refmap, def:algobj
   - Lean (Phase 5 imports): def:fuscat, def:Q, def:fib, def:phi, def:fib-F, def:fib-mult, def:coassoc, def:PF
   - Julia (Phase 8 imports): def:partition, def:refmap, def:TL-cat, def:fsymbol, def:fib-F, def:ising-F
4. Validation methodology: reference P1.9 audit as concrete example of R-gate (zero CRITICAL/MAJOR + 5 MINOR-fix-on-the-spot pattern).
5. Three Hilbert-space framings note (line 167): mark P1.4 complete + reference bridge report + GLOSSARY entries.
6. Update reference to PROVENANCE.md from 'stub' to 'populated with Phase 1 baseline'.

Validation gates: M (build/parse pass), D (uses GLOSSARY-defined terms only), R (brief Opus review of the diff only per plan).
close_reason: P1.11 complete: PRD.md refreshed v0 -> v1. Status line updated; Phase-0 exception lifted (with historical note); canonical artifacts section reflects Phase 1 complete; new GLOSSARY-entries-by-task-class section (Math/Lean/Julia/Scripts/Literature); validation methodology includes concrete Phase-1 examples (P1.9 R-gate audit, D-gate replay logic, C-gate ERRATA example); Known limitations updated with locked Hilbert framings + LB-1/2/3/4 bd issues; Pre-read warnings updated with [P1.6(letter)] anchors + audit-confirmed callouts. Brief Opus review of diff: APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS (single nit re ephemeral /tmp/ path applied; replaced with reproducible replay logic description). 279 lines.

title: P1.10: PROVENANCE.md refresh (Phase 1 canonical baseline)
description:
Phase 1 step P1.10 per MIGRATION_PLAN.md:134. Update PROVENANCE.md from stub to populated state with a Phase 1 canonical baseline: which content is now canonical (GLOSSARY.md, CONVENTIONS.md, ERRATA.md, summary.tex, supporting stocktake reports), with source paths + SHA256 hashes + provenance chains.

For each Phase 1 canonical artifact, record:
- Source path (in-repo or external project)
- SHA256 at this commit
- Migration step that authored / last touched it
- Provenance chain for synthesised content (e.g., GLOSSARY §B entry def:mobile-Fock <- opus-hilbert-bridge.md <- microscopic-mobile-anyons/tex/sections/finegraining.tex)
- Validation gates passed

Per P1.9 audit follow-up #6: include the P1.9 audit verdict in the GLOSSARY/CONVENTIONS entries so future audits can read the prior verdict.

Validation gates: M (entries follow the documented schema; all hashes recomputable), I (entries are repeatable / idempotent — re-running the hash computation gives the same result). No R gate (no Opus review of P1.10 per the plan).
close_reason: P1.10 complete: PROVENANCE.md refreshed from stub to populated state. Phase 1 canonical baseline section (summary table + per-artifact entries) records every canonical artifact's SHA256, last-touch commit, P-step, source, and provenance chain. Validation gates per plan: M (entries follow schema; all hashes recomputable via e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855  -), I (hash-stable post-landing). No R gate per the plan (P1.10 is mechanical/integrity only; no review subagent). 288 lines.

title: P1.9: Definitional gate audit (Opus reads GLOSSARY+CONVENTIONS end-to-end)
description:
Phase 1 step P1.9 per stocktake/MIGRATION_PLAN.md:133. Spawn an Opus 4.7 hostile audit subagent that reads GLOSSARY.md (1790 lines, 49 entries: 48 in §A from summary.tex + 1 in §B mobile-Fock) and CONVENTIONS.md (552 lines, 10 entries a-j) end-to-end and produces a report flagging:
- Any term used in GLOSSARY without its own entry.
- Any internal inconsistency between entries.
- Any conflict with summary.tex.
- Any cross-link [[slug]] that doesn't resolve.
- Any forward-pointer [P1.6(x)] from GLOSSARY that doesn't resolve to a CONVENTIONS entry.
- Any silent disagreement with stocktake/reports/opus-hilbert-bridge.md (the authoritative Hilbert-space framing source).

Output to stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-audit.md.

Validation gates: M (audit report produced); R (user must read and either approve or request edits before Phase 2 begins).

**Critical:** this is the gate before Phase 2 starts (provenance/validator imports). Per MIGRATION_PLAN line 137-139: 'Stop and confirm with user before proceeding to Phase 2.' The audit's verdict is binding on whether Phase 2 unblocks.
close_reason: P1.9 complete: Opus 4.7 hostile-audit subagent read GLOSSARY + CONVENTIONS end-to-end. Verdict APPROVE FOR PHASE 2 (zero CRITICAL, zero MAJOR, 8 MINOR/NIT). All 5 MINOR cleanups applied in same commit (GLOSSARY Status refresh; CONVENTIONS Status refresh; 7 future-tense forward-pointers → past tense / [P1.X(letter)]; archive path clarified; def:Q sweep wording fixed). 3 NITs (findings 6-8: orphan entries, schema TBD-by-design, asymmetric cross-links) deferred as optional polish. Phase 2 unblocked pending user read-and-approve of the audit. LB-4 (cft-anyons-?) filed for post-snapshot-import re-validation. Report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-audit.md.

title: P1.8: MMA-Julia translation maps in GLOSSARY
description:
Phase 1 step P1.8 per stocktake/MIGRATION_PLAN.md:132. Symmetric to P1.7 (CAD-Lean): populate the ~45 MMA-bullet stubs in GLOSSARY.md by reading stocktake/reports/mma-julia.md §5 (per-struct mapping of MMA Julia structs to summary.tex sections). Plan-named primary targets: def:partition <- LabelledConfig; def:refmap <- normalized_product_isometry (= E_{P->P'}); def:TL-cat <- interaction_hamiltonian (sum P_j <-> e_i/d_sigma). Other MMA bullets get either a substantive mapping or 'Not implemented in MMA' note with brief justification.

Validation gates: D (no SA canonical body touched); M (substantive coverage of all MMA-mapped concepts from mma-julia.md S5); R (Opus 4.7 hostile review subagent).

Pattern from P1.7 (commit d8c0a40): Python-script-then-Write for bulk edits, then verify SA canonical bodies are still byte-verbatim via D-gate replay; spawn Opus reviewer subagent; apply minor edits; commit with full provenance footer.
close_reason: P1.8 complete: 45 MMA bullets populated + conv:basics Aliases updated. Hostile Opus reviewer verdict APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS, all 5 edits applied. D-gate 48/48 PASS, cross-links 43/49 resolve (1 false positive = schema-doc [[label]] template), P1.5 entries intact, schema-doc preserved. 2 follow-up bd issues filed (cft-anyons-2ae LB-2 dense Ising test; cft-anyons-pvu LB-3 fabricated-API audit). Review report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.8-review.md.

title: P1.7: CAD-Lean translation map entries in GLOSSARY (def:Hlatt ↔ IndefiniteParticleSectorCoordinates etc.)
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1 step P1.7. Symmetric to P1.5 but for CAD instead of MMA. Source: stocktake/reports/cad-lean.md §5 (per-file mapping of CAD Lean files to summary.tex definitions). Each summary.tex definition that has a CAD-Lean coordinate-skeleton equivalent gets a CAD bullet filled in its Translation map. Per P1.4-early findings, clarify per-file scope — Lean side is at the *coordinate skeleton* level (not categorical), document what user must supply (e.g., sectorBasis : Config label n → Type) to instantiate it as a model of H_N^W. Validation: M (each CAD Lean file mentioned in cad-lean.md has a GLOSSARY translation entry), D (translations match cad-lean.md §5). Reviewer-gated (Core tier — load-bearing for Phase 4-5 Lean migration). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.7 complete: 49 CAD bullets populated across all GLOSSARY entries. M-gate: all 23 CAD Lean files mentioned in cad-lean.md §5 covered (initial 19/23, +4 supporting files added: BraidMatrices.lean to def:fib; ConfigurationSpace/FockSpace.lean to def:Hlatt; Isometry.lean to def:refmap). Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS — 2 applied (def:polar-repair Mathlib-gap factual correction; conv:basics Aliases dangling P1.7 reference cleaned up). Report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.7-review.md.

title: P1.6: write 10 CONVENTIONS.md entries (vacuum index, F-matrix gauge, dagger, multiplicity, conjugation, TikZ, particle-number, Q choice, fusion-tree ordering, N=0 boundary)
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1 step P1.6 (10-item list, expanded from 6 by P1.4-early per opus-hilbert-bridge.md §4). All 10 forward-pointers from P1.3 and P1.5 (P1.6(a)/(b)/(c)/(d)/(e)/(f)/(g)/(h)/(i)/(j)) currently resolve to a stub. Tasks: (1) define CONVENTIONS.md schema; (2) write each convention with canonical choice, reasoning, source references, and cross-links to GLOSSARY entries that use it. Validation: D (each convention declared with reasoning). Reviewer-gated (Core tier — load-bearing for all downstream content). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.6 complete: 10 CONVENTIONS.md entries (a)-(j) declared; all 7 in-use forward-pointers from GLOSSARY resolve; (f) TikZ deferred (no TikZ in summary.tex, pre-registered hook). Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS — 5 polish edits applied (b-citation line range, c-overreach softening, j-MMA-N parenthetical, h-primaries-vs-simples note, status block clarification). Report at stocktake/reports/opus-conventions-p1.6-review.md.

title: P1.5: write explicit Hilbert-space translation maps into GLOSSARY (def:HP / def:Hlatt / def:indlim / def:mobile-Fock)
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1 step P1.5. P1.4-early already produced a clean reconcile (YELLOW verdict, no STOP condition). This step transcribes the constructive bijections from stocktake/reports/opus-hilbert-bridge.md §2 into the Translation map fields of the four Hilbert-space GLOSSARY entries. Specifically: def:HP MMA ↔ mobile-Fock (§2.3 chain); def:Hlatt MMA ↔ mobile-Fock (§2.2); def:indlim MMA discrete analogue + cad continuum-vs-discrete note (§2 + §2.4); def:mobile-Fock summary.tex/partition + summary.tex/N-tensor (§2.1 + §2.3 reverse directions). CAD-side translations remain TBD pending P1.7 (separate step). Validation: D (translation maps copied faithfully from bridge report, with adapted-from framing not verbatim), R (hostile review). Reviewer-gated (Core tier — touches GLOSSARY load-bearing entries). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.5 complete: explicit Hilbert-space translation maps written into def:HP / def:Hlatt / def:indlim / def:mobile-Fock from bridge report §2. Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS — F-matrix gauge bullet added to def:Hlatt to match def:mobile-Fock. CAD-side translations stay TBD pending P1.7. Report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.5-review.md.

title: P1.3: GLOSSARY entries for the three Hilbert-space framings (H_P^W canonical; mobile-Fock + H_N^W stubbed)
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1 step P1.3. summary.tex defines two formulations (def:HP H_P^W, def:Hlatt H_N^W) already extracted in P1.1; MMA's mobile-Fock is the third and is NOT in summary.tex. Tasks: (1) add new GLOSSARY entry def:mobile-Fock sourced from stocktake/reports/opus-hilbert-bridge.md (the in-repo authoritative description of MMA's framing; MMA itself imports in Phase 8); (2) declare def:HP as canonical for the project (already done in P1.1 — verify still in place); (3) add cross-links between def:HP / def:Hlatt / def:indlim / def:mobile-Fock so the four-way relationship is explicit; (4) stub Translation map content as 'TBD pending P1.5' (P1.5 fills in the actual map from the bridge report). P1.4 deep-dive already done early so 'TBD pending P1.4' in plan text is dated. Validation: M (4 entries present + properly cross-linked), D (def:mobile-Fock body matches what bridge report says about MMA). Reviewer-gated (Core tier — touches GLOSSARY). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.3 complete: §A/§B split established in GLOSSARY; def:mobile-Fock added in §B (sourced from opus-hilbert-bridge.md); def:HP, def:Hlatt, def:indlim Notes cross-linked. Translation-map fields stubbed 'TBD pending P1.5' per plan. Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS — 5 applied (trailing-period restoration; 'adapted from' instead of 'verbatim'; §3 instead of §2.4 for N=0 reference; schema-doc extension authorising multiple Canonical blocks in §B; def:HP particle-number rewording). 2 P1.1-carry-forward claims were false-positives (both edits already in file). Report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.3-review.md.

title: P1.2: ERRATA entry for unanimous lem:binary-Z amplitudes-vs-probabilities bug + verify/apply summary.tex fix
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1, step P1.2. The lem:binary-Z bug (chat-4 source displays probabilities Z(x)Z(y)/Z(L) but isometric morphism requires amplitudes sqrt{Z(x)Z(y)/Z(L)}) was unanimously flagged by all 4 hostile reviews (review_1_algebra Issue1, review_2_categorical Issue11, review_3_cft Issue17, review_4_consistency). Tasks: (1) confirm what the actual unanimous flag was by reading all 4 reviews; (2) confirm whether the fix is already applied in summary.tex or still pending — the in-doc warning at line 1583 acknowledges the bug and claims 'the square-rooted formulas above are the corrected version'; (3) if pending, apply the fix; (4) add ERRATA.md entry pointing to all 4 reviewer issues with full provenance. Validation: M (pdflatex still builds, same TOC), D (fix changes ONLY displayed coefficients, no surrounding text), C (4 reviewers agree), R (in-doc warning already authored — but external hostile review still required per CLAUDE.md Rule 4 for any summary.tex edit). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.2 complete: ERRATA entry added for lem:binary-Z amplitudes-vs-probabilities bug. Fix was already applied to summary.tex before this repo was initialised (no summary.tex changes in this commit); ERRATA formalises the audit trail. 3 of 4 hostile reviews flagged the bug (review_1 Issue 1 + review_2 Issue 11 + review_3 Issue 17); review_4 silent on this lemma. Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS — both applied. Report at stocktake/reports/opus-errata-p1.2-review.md.

title: P1.1: extract \begin{definition} and \begin{convention} from summary.tex into GLOSSARY.md
description: Per MIGRATION_PLAN Phase 1, step P1.1. Walk summary.tex end-to-end; for each \begin{definition}[…]\label{def:…} and each \begin{convention}\label{conv:…} (4 conv + 44 def = 48 entries), append a GLOSSARY entry using the schema declared in GLOSSARY.md. Canonical: copied verbatim. Source: summary.tex:<line>. Aliases / Translation map: stubbed TBD pending P1.7-P1.8 (MMA/CAD translation phases). Validation: M (every begin{definition}/begin{convention} has GLOSSARY entry — mechanical check), D (verbatim, not paraphrased). Reviewer-gated (Core tier per CLAUDE.md Rule 4). Parent: cft-anyons-k3s.
close_reason: P1.1 complete: 48 entries (4 conv + 44 def) extracted verbatim from summary.tex; M+D+C+R gates pass; Opus reviewer APPROVE WITH MINOR EDITS, all three minor edits applied. Review report at stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.1-review.md.

title: P1.4-early: Hilbert-space three-framings deep-dive (Opus)
description: Pulled forward from MIGRATION_PLAN P1.4 to de-risk Phase 1. Compare three formulations: summary.tex H_P^W = Hom_C(W, A_P); MMA mobile-Fock H = ⊕_N ⊕_configs Hom(c, X_{a_1}⊗…⊗X_{a_N}); CAD H_N^W = Hom_C(W, Q^⊗N). Produce translation map or identify obstructions. If irreconcilable, the whole MIGRATION_PLAN needs revision.

title: P0: Phase 0 — repo skeleton, bd init, meta-files, PRD
description: Repo skeleton, bd init, meta-file stubs, chat archival, PRD v0 drafted and hostile-reviewed. Completed 2026-05-16. See MIGRATION_LOG.md for per-step commits.

title: P1: Phase 1 — Definitional bedrock (GLOSSARY)
description: Build GLOSSARY.md by extracting canonical definitions from summary.tex per MIGRATION_PLAN.md Phase 1 steps P1.1-P1.11. STOP point at P1.5 (Hilbert-space translation map) — if Opus deep-dive in P1.4 finds the three Hilbert-space framings irreconcilable, the whole plan needs revision. End of phase: GLOSSARY + CONVENTIONS locked; PRD refreshed v0 → v1.

title: LB-1: MMA enumerate_fusion_trees incomplete for non-multiplicity-free categories
description: Bug in microscopic-mobile-anyons/src/MobileAnyons/hilbert.jl:42-68 — treats dim Hom > 0 as Boolean rather than enumerating multiplicity-vertex basis. Invisible for Fibonacci/Ising/sVec (multiplicity-free); blocking for any extension. Discovered in P1.4-early Hilbert-space deep-dive (stocktake/reports/opus-hilbert-bridge.md §3.5). Fix during Phase 8 (MMA migration) at P8.4: port with multiplicity counting, or at minimum add TODO marker + RESEARCH_NOTES entry. See RESEARCH_NOTES.md §Latent bugs LB-1.

title: LB-4: Re-validate archive/mma-archive-v0-snapshot/ cited paths post-import
description:
Per P1.9 audit Finding 4 (stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-audit.md): CONVENTIONS (a) cites archive/mma-archive-v0-snapshot/.../hilbert_space.md:39, but the in-repo directory currently contains only .gitkeep. The ground-truth file lives at /home/tobias/Projects/microscopic-mobile-anyons/archive/v0/docs/hilbert_space.md:39. Per CLAUDE.md file map this directory is reserved for the deprecated-MMA snapshot import scheduled in a later phase.

P1.9 mitigation: CONVENTIONS (a) Reasoning and Translation rules now clarify that the in-repo directory is a placeholder and name the ground-truth file path.

Follow-up action (this issue): once the deprecated-MMA snapshot is imported into archive/mma-archive-v0-snapshot/, verify that the cited path hilbert_space.md:39 actually contains the expected '0-indexed simple reference' content (X_0 = 1). If line numbers have drifted or the file has been renamed, update CONVENTIONS (a) to match. Blocks on the snapshot import step (likely Phase 2 or later).

title: LB-3: Audit GLOSSARY for fabricated TensorCategories function names
description: Per P1.8 reviewer finding (Edit 2 + follow-up #2, stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.8-review.md): the P1.8 first-pass GLOSSARY draft fabricated the TensorCategories.jl function name 'multiplication_table' (caught by the reviewer and fixed in the same P1.8 commit). Class concern: are there other plausible-sounding but fabricated TensorCategories.jl API references elsewhere in GLOSSARY/CONVENTIONS or in future text additions? Action: run a bulk grep of all referenced TensorCategories.jl symbols against the actual TensorCategories.jl API (or against MMA's src/test usage) and flag any that don't appear. Best done as a Phase-8 pre-migration audit, or as a one-shot scripts/check-tensor-categories-api.py. Out of P1.8 scope.

title: LB-2: Add MMA test for dense Ising c=1/2 sector
description: Per P1.8 reviewer finding (Edit 5, stocktake/reports/opus-glossary-p1.8-review.md): MMA's def:dense GLOSSARY entry currently has no test coverage. The two related test files test/test_golden_chain.jl and test/test_golden_chain_cft.jl exercise the **Fibonacci** golden chain at c=7/10 (tricritical Ising fixed point), not the categorical **Ising** dense sigma-chain that should flow to c=1/2 critical Ising. Filing as a Phase-8-gated follow-up: add a new MMA test that runs enumerate_configs_hc(L, L, ising_category()) for L=4..12 and verifies the c=1/2 spectrum via Cardy finite-size fit. Out of P1.8 scope; blocks on Phase 8 (MMA migration).
